meanings.definition: To apply pressure to something by pushing against it

meanings.definition: To squeeze or compress something tightly
To remove hair from the skin using a razor
To make fabric or garments by interlocking loops of yarn with needles
To produce text or images on paper using a printer or press
To place goods or cargo onto a vehicle or container
To charge a battery or electronic device
To ask someone questions repeatedly or persistently

To select from a number of alternatives

meanings.definition: Feeling content because one's wishes or expectations have been met
Feeling resentment toward someone because of their possessions or success

meanings.definition: Unwilling to spend or give; miserly
